text:
On Tue, Feb 1, 2011 at 11:31 AM, Li-Lun "Leland" Wang <llwang@infor.org> wr=
ote:
> Hi,
>
> Your old distfiles are wrong and longer than the ones on the master
> site, so fetch couldn't fix it by resuming transfer. =A0If you make
> distclean and fetch again, they should match the original checksum in
> the distinfo. =A0The patch is not needed and should not be committed.
>

Oh yeah I stand corrected, it looked like from a stale NFS mount.

Please invalidate PR, thanks! ;-)

cheers
